title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.633 - Terms of voting members — nonvoting members, terms
text:
178.633.  Terms of voting members — nonvoting members, terms. — Voting members of the board shall be appointed for terms of six years, except that of the voting members first appointed, two shall serve for two years, two for four years, and three for six years.  The terms and conditions of service for nonvoting members shall be the same as provided by law for the University of Missouri.
(L. 1995 S.B. 101 § 3)
